title: NoSQL Injection (Mongo-style)
description: DocVault passes your JSON body straight into a Mongo-style query. Send a query operator instead of a string and walk past the password check.

hints.text: The body becomes the query filter. Mongo (and Mongo-likes) accept operator dicts: {"$ne": null}, {"$regex": "^a"}, {"$gt": ""}.
POST /login with {"username":"admin","password":{"$ne":null}} — username equals 'admin', password is not equal to null (anything). Admin matches.
